label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's read the passage and then look at the question. The passage is about Zhao Wenxuan, a film star from Taiwan. It mentions that he worked in an airline before becoming a film actor. He got his chance in acting when he answered an advertisement for the film "Wedding Feast." The film was a hit, winning awards like the German Golden Bear and being in Oscar competition. It was the first Taiwan film allowed to be shown in the U.S. Because of this film, Zhao became popular in Taiwan, Hong Kong, and Southeast Asia. Now, the question asks which choice is suggested by the text. The options are: A) "Wedding Feast" is just an ordinary film B) the film "Wedding Feast" disappointed people greatly C) Zhao Wenxuan became a famous movie star because of the film "Wedding Feast" D) A lot of the Taiwan films are shown in the U.S. every year Looking at the text, it clearly states that "The film 'Wedding Feast' proved to be a hit," and that it won awards and was the first Taiwan film shown in the U.S. It also says "Thanks to the film, Zhao Wenxuan became popular..." So option C is directly supported by the text. Option A is incorrect because the text says the film was a hit, not ordinary. Option
